title: Havor's spacecraft
content:
{{Top|leg}}
{{Conjecture|legends}}
[[File:Havorship.jpg|thumb|Havor's spacecraft.]]

'''Havor's spacecraft''' was the [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggling]] vessel of [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Havor]]. He used it to smuggle [[Aayla Secura/Legends|Aayla Secura]] to restricted space over [[Kiffex/Legends|Kiffex]]. The ship was intercepted by a [[Guardian vessel]]. Since Havor had not spent much money on his ship's shields, they soon gave way under fire. The vessel was destroyed, although Aayla ejected in an escape pod in time.

==Appearances==
*[[Star Wars (1998) 32|''Star Wars'' (1998) 32]]
